title: gossypium timorense
intro: Gossypium timorense, also known as the Timorese cotton tree, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Gossypium, native to Timor Island in the East Nusa Tenggara province of Indonesia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Gossypium timorense include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Gossypium timorense can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine in Indonesia and other parts of Southeast Asia.
